name: Nguyen Phan Nguyen
paragraphs: I am Nguyen Nguyen (win-win), or Stephen. I am a Data Science student at Virginia Tech. My journey to myself today all began with the moment I became a TEDx speaker, talking about "A Wary but Positive Look at AI", I played guitar on stage and yapped about AI, Emotions. I felt really good. Now, I love music, art, and storytelling and I believe I could be a data magician who could transform huge messy data into a beautiful storylines for any company. With that, I'd love to work with AI and convince the world that my solution is human enough to conquer people problems we have. Simply because I've got people skills.
But, there's one thing I doubt that AI can...
There’s no “I” in AI. Does AI really have emotion–or does it borrow ours to make us feel?
How about AI as an artist and musician?
